svg.title: Encoder tensor dimensions across 4 blocks
svg.desc: Each encoder block halves spatial dimensions (H and W) while doubling channel count. Shown as 3D cuboid representations whose volume stays roughly constant.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the input tensor look like?')
sendPrompt('What is the latent bottleneck space?')

svg.text: Face width = spatial size (H or W)
Total values = channels × H × W (shown below each block)
Compression: 49 152 → 16 384 (ratio 3:1). Forces the network to keep only what matters.
